site.name: WebXC
site.tagline: Your digital foundation, built to be understood.
site.description: A strategic digital performance partner that makes established businesses clearly understood, trusted, and citable by both search engines and AI.

/.title: WebXC — Strategic Digital Performance for Established NZ Businesses
/.description: WebXC makes established businesses clearly understood, trusted, and citable across search and AI through strategy-led digital foundations you fully own.

/about/.title: About WebXC — Andrew Newman
/about/.description: Meet the strategic thinking behind WebXC. Principal-led digital performance for established New Zealand businesses.

/services/.title: Services — WebXC
/services/.description: From positioning and content optimisation to full strategic website builds. Choose the path that fits your business.

/services/positioning-content-optimisati.title: Positioning & Content Optimisation — WebXC
/services/positioning-content-optimisati.description: For businesses whose existing site is structurally adequate but whose positioning, content, and digital signals don't reflect the strength of the business.

/services/full-digital-foundation-build/.title: Full Digital Foundation Build — WebXC
/services/full-digital-foundation-build/.description: A complete website design and technical build led by business strategy, structured for both search engines and generative AI.

/services/ongoing-content-visibility/.title: Ongoing Content & Visibility — WebXC
/services/ongoing-content-visibility/.description: Sustained strategic content development, authority building, and AI visibility monitoring for businesses that want to compound their digital advantage.

/discovery/.title: Discovery & Strategic Review — WebXC
/discovery/.description: A structured discovery session producing prioritised strategic and tactical recommendations for your digital presence.

/blog/.title: Insights — WebXC
/blog/.description: Practical insights on AI visibility, search strategy, and digital foundations for established New Zealand businesses.

/contact/.title: Contact WebXC
/contact/.description: Start a conversation about your digital presence. No pressure, no pitch — just an honest discussion about where you stand.

andrew.name: Andrew Newman
andrew.description: Strategic digital performance consultant helping established NZ businesses build digital foundations that reflect their real-world credibility.
